scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,instruments,providers,market,fundamentals,events,notifications,portfolio,insights,web -c white,cyan,yellow,gray,green,greenBright,magentaBright,cyanBright,blue,red,magenta "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/gateway/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/authentication/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/instruments/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/providers/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/market/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/fundamentals/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/events/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/notifications/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/portfolio/src/server.ts" "node --env-file=.env --watch --import tsx services/insights/src/server.ts" "pnpm --filter @portfolio/web dev"
